mechanism_narrative: A higher 3-month change in FEDFUNDS raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest as of t-1mo was 4.33
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns following positive 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are not below returns following negative changes in at least 60% of walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises rapidly, recession risk and expected earnings downgrades increase, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest as of t-1mo was 4.1
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with rising labor-market slack
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below unconditional mean return.

mechanism_narrative: A positive turn in retail sales momentum signals improving household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest as of t-2mo was 723853.0
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS momentum triggers have lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation momentum is high while FEDFUNDS is already elevated, markets price a longer restrictive policy stance, compressing equity multiples and lowering 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS is above 4%
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL latest as of t-1mo was 319.775
fact:FEDFUNDS latest as of t-1mo was 4.33
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation high-rate trigger does not underperform single-series CPIAUCSL or FEDFUNDS signals on 20-day forward returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Stronger 3-month INDPRO momentum indicates improving production volumes and operating leverage, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest as of t-2mo was 103.511
failure_condition: Reject if the coefficient on 3-month INDPRO momentum is not positive or the rank IC is below 0.03 across three consecutive annual walk-forward evaluations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in housing starts signals weaker rate-sensitive demand, future construction activity, and household durables demand, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest as of t-2mo was 1366.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside triggers are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than 55% of historical triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth with stable unemployment signals labor-income support without visible slack deterioration, improving soft-landing odds and producing positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change crosses above +100k while UNRATE 3-month change is <= +0.1 percentage points
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest as of t-1mo was 159218
fact:UNRATE latest as of t-1mo was 4.1
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-strength stable-unemployment trigger fails to outperform PAYEMS-only and UNRATE-only signals on 20-day mean forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly acceleration in CPIAUCSL above a high threshold causes near-term rate repricing and multiple compression, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
fact:CPIAUCSL latest as of t-1mo was 319.775
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day forward returns after CPIAUCSL upside-threshold crossings are not lower than unconditional 5-day returns in at least 60% of walk-forward test windows.
